channel.title: The Breaker Blog — Breaker Tools Pro
channel.description: Practical pricing, strategy, and tooling guides for card breakers.

item.title: The 7 Best Card Breaking Software Tools in 2026 (Ranked by an Actual Breaker)
item.description: An honest, hands-on ranking of the real card breaking software breakers choose between in 2026 — competitors included — so you pick the right tool for how you run breaks.

item.title: Whatnot Fee Calculator: How to Know Your Real Break Margin
item.description: Whatnot takes a cut before you ever see the money. Here's the exact formula to back it out of your pricing so every break is profitable before you go live.
